---
title: "IOTC Albacore Management Strategy Evaluation"
---

This site hosts the materials for the Management Strategy Evaluation (MSE)
process for Indian Ocean Tuna Commission (IOTC) albacore tuna, developed by
Blue Matter Science.

The MSE process tests candidate management procedures against a range of
plausible operating models for the stock and fishery, to evaluate their
performance against management objectives under uncertainty.

## Materials

- [**Trial Specifications Document**](tsd/): the operating models,
  management procedures, and performance metrics used in the MSE.
- [**`iotcALB` R package**](pkg/): the R package implementing the MSE
  analysis, with full technical/code documentation.
